Article Title: Isha Gramotsavam expands to North India, set to cover 10 states in biggest edition yet
Article Text:
Isha Gramotsavam expands to North India, set to cover 10 states in biggest edition yet

Rural sports festival Isha Gramotsavam will make its foray into North India this year, with its 18th edition expanding to 10 states and one Union Territory, bringing together more than 80,000 players from over 40,000 villages in what organisers described as the biggest edition of the event so far.Organised by Sadhguru's Isha Outreach and recognised as a FIT India initiative and a National Sports Promotion Organisation by the Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports, the tournament will, for the first time, be held in Uttar Pradesh, Haryana, Himachal Pradesh, Odisha and Maharashtra, alongside Tamil Nadu, Kerala, Karnataka, Telangana, Andhra Pradesh and Puducherry.The multi-stage competition, featuring men's volleyball and women's throwball, is expected to see participation from nearly 7,000 teams, including around 15,000 women players, competing for a prize pool of more than Rs 1 crore.Addressing the launch press conference here on Tuesday, Swami Pulaka said the expansion reflects the organisation's long-standing vision of using sport as a tool for social transformation."We are conducting Isha Gramotsavam in North India for the first time. More than 250 locations will host competitions across the country. Our aim has always been to use sport as a tool to bring positive change to society. Sports brings people together and helps transform lives," Swami Pulaka told reporters.He said Isha Foundation has also been organising coaching camps across participating states to introduce rural youth to the competition."The two sports we have chosen are volleyball for men and throwball for women. Every player in a team should belong to the same gram panchayat. Professional players are not allowed because our objective is to promote grassroots sports and encourage village talent," he added.Cluster-level matches will begin from the second week of July before progressing to divisional rounds and state finals. The Grand Finale is scheduled to be held at the Isha Yoga Center in Coimbatore in September in the presence of Sadhguru.In Uttar Pradesh, cluster-level matches will be held across Lucknow, Varanasi, Muzaffarnagar, Meerut and Gautam Buddh Nagar before the state finals in Lucknow on August 9. Haryana will host cluster matches in Panipat, Karnal, Ambala, Hisar and Kurukshetra, with the state finals slated for Karnal on the same day.Among those present at the launch were former champions whose lives have been transformed through the tournament.Two-time throwball champion Nandini from Devaraipuram village in Tamil Nadu recalled that women in her village were initially unfamiliar with the sport until Isha Foundation conducted workshops."Playing throwball helped me deal with stress and eventually inspired me to become a physical education teacher," she said.Three-time volleyball champion and Most Valuable Player Manikandan said the tournament altered the course of his sporting career."I was a kabaddi player before my village won Isha Gramotsavam in 2016. Receiving the trophy from Sachin Tendulkar inspired me to switch to volleyball. Winning the MVP award later helped me improve sports facilities in my village and renovate my house," he said.Over the past two decades, Isha Gramotsavam has engaged more than 2.6 lakh rural players from over 35,000 villages while also showcasing rural India's cultural heritage through traditional folk performances, village games and regional cuisine alongside the sporting competitions.
Article Summary: Isha gramotsavam expands to north india, set to cover 10 states in biggest edition yet. Multi-stage competition, featuring men's volleyball and women's throwball, is expected to see participation from nearly 7,000 teams, including around 15,000 women players.

Article Title: Who is Caitlin Clark's boyfriend? Inside Connor McCaffery's basketball journey and their relationship
Article Text:
Caitlin Clark's boyfriend, Connor McCaffery, is a former Iowa Hawkeyes basketball player and ex-assistant coach at Butler University. The couple began dating in 2023 while attending the University of Iowa and have consistently supported each other's careers. As Clark's WNBA stardom with the Indiana Fever continues to grow, McCaffery has remained a steady presence, with their relationship drawing attention for its strong foundation and shared passion for basketball.

Who is Connor McCaffery?

Caitlin Clark and Connor McCaffery relationship continues to grow



Caitlin Clark has become one of the brightest stars in the WNBA and that has also created more interest in the people closest to her. Among them is Connor McCaffery, the former college basketball player who has been a steadying presence during Clark’s meteoric rise. Clark is making waves with the Indiana Fever, but McCaffery has carved out his own path in the game, quietly building a relationship that is rooted in a shared love of the game.Connor McCaffery grew up with basketball. He is a member of one of the most recognizable families in college basketball and played for the Iowa Hawkeyes under his father, longtime head coach Fran McCaffery. He played six seasons in college, where he developed a reputation for leadership, court vision and versatility, not eye-popping scoring numbers.McCaffery also played baseball before dedicating himself fully to basketball, demonstrating his capacity to compete at a high level in more than one sport. His Iowa experience helped mold him into a reliable teammate who contributed in multiple facets of the game.When his playing days were over, McCaffery turned his focus to coaching. He started with the Indiana Pacers and then joined Butler University’s men’s basketball program as an assistant coach.Later reports said he stepped away from the role before the start of the 2026 season, another step in his basketball journey.While he has largely stayed out of the spotlight compared to Clark, McCaffery has continued to earn respect in basketball circles for his knowledge of the game and commitment to player development.The relationship between Clark and McCaffery dates back to their time together at the University of Iowa, where the pair were heavily involved in the school’s basketball programs. The pair allegedly began dating in 2023 and went public on social media, giving fans an insight into their life together.Since then, the couple have often supported each other’s careers. Often, McCaffery has been seen cheering on Clark at her Iowa Hawkeyes and Indiana Fever games, and Clark has reciprocated, appearing at events tied to McCaffery’s coaching career.Their relationship has continued to draw attention for how both have balanced demanding basketball schedules while celebrating each other’s successes. In April 2026, they celebrated their third anniversary with heartfelt social media posts that showed their close bond, marking another milestone in their journey together.Meanwhile Clark's basketball career reached new heights. She became the NCAA Division I all-time leading scorer and was the No. 1 overall pick in the 2024 Draft, quickly becoming one of the league’s biggest stars. She had record-setting performances, triple-doubles, the WNBA Rookie of the Year award in her first season.Clark’s popularity keeps rising, and McCaffery has been one of her biggest cheerleaders. Having played basketball together, constant encouragement of each other and steady support from the public have turned them into one of the most talked about young couples in American sports.
Article Summary: Caitlin clark and connor mccaffery are one of the most talked about young couples in american sports. The couple began dating in 2023 while attending the university of iowa and have consistently supported each other's careers. As clark's wnba stardom with the indiana fever continues to grow, mccaffry has remained a steady presence.

Article Title: Lionel Messi scripts World Cup history in England semi-final triumph with record no player has ever matched
Article Text: Argentina's Lionel Messi celebrates with his teammates at the end of the World Cup semifinal soccer match between England and Argentina in Atlanta, Wednesday, July 15, 2026. (AP Photo/Rebecca Blackwell)
Article Summary: Argentina's lionel messi celebrates with his teammates at the end of the world cup semifinal soccer match between england and argentina in atlanta, wednesday, july 15, 2026. (ap photo/rebecca blackwell) england's raheem sterling scored two goals against argentina in the semifinal.

Article Title: Argentina vs England FIFA World Cup SF match result: Lionel Messi shines as Argentina pull off stunner against England in Atlanta to reach WC final
Article Text:
Argentina's Lionel Messi celebrates after teammate Lautaro Martinez scored their side's second goal during the World Cup semifinal match between England and Argentina in Atlanta. (AP/PTI)

Lightning has struck twice for England. Just as they dared to dream of a first World Cup final on foreign soil, a masterclass in late-game execution by Lionel Messi dragged defending champions Argentina from the brink of elimination to secure a sensational 2–1 comeback victory at a raucous Mercedes-Benz Stadium on Wednesday night.Trailing 1–0 with just five minutes of normal time remaining, La Albiceleste looked a shadow of the side that conquered the world in Qatar. Yet, with their crown slipping, Lionel Messi stood tallest. The legendary playmaker registered two assists in a devastating seven-minute spell, culminating in a 92nd-minute headed winner from substitute Lautaro Martínez and a 85th minute stunner from Enzo Fernandez sent the South American contingent in Atlanta into utter delirium.The match lived up to its billing as one of international football's fiercest, most historically loaded rivalries long before referee Ismail Elfath blew his first whistle. A deafening atmosphere saw both sets of fans trying to drown out the opposition’s national anthem, a tense energy that quickly spilled onto the pitch. A highly fractious first half was constantly halted by physical clashes, with Leandro Paredes flying in late on Jude Bellingham early on, and Enzo Fernández replicating the robust treatment on Elliot Anderson.With neither side establishing a rhythm, a sterile first half ended goalless. But the tactical chess match burst into life after the interval. Morgan Rogers curls a magnificent cross from the right flank to the back post in 55th minute, where Anthony Gordon ghosts past Cuti Romero to steer a clinical finish past Emi Martínez.Faced with a deficit, Thomas Tuchel’s England chose to retreat, shifting into a defensive low block. They were forced to absorb immense pressure. A stunning finger-tip save from Pickford denied substitute Nico González, before Alexis Mac Allister hit the post with a header.Then came the inevitable heartbreak. In the 85th minute, a short-corner routine saw Messi lay the ball off to Enzo Fernández, who unleashed a fierce, curving long-range effort that sailed into the far corner of the net.With England reeling and structural composure shattered, Argentina struck the killer blow two minutes into stoppage time. Messi found space on the flank, shifting the ball onto his right foot to deliver an insouciant, pinpoint cross. Lautaro Martínez anticipated the flight perfectly, leaping between John Stones and Reece James to power home a five-yard header.At the final whistle, a spent Messi dropped to his knees in celebration. Argentina now stand just one game away from matching Italy's 1934-1938 and Brazil's historic 1958–1962 feat of winning back-to-back World Cups. Standing in their way is Spain in East Rutherford on Sunday, a fittingly epic final for a monumental tournament.
Article Summary: Argentina beat england 2-1 in world cup semifinal in atlanta. Anthony gordon gave england the lead in 55th minute. Lautaro martínez and enzo fernández scored in 92nd and 85th minutes. Lionel messi registered two assists in seven minute spell.

Article Title: 'We're gutted': Harry Kane reveals Thomas Tuchel's final instruction England failed to follow against Argentina
Article Text:
England's Harry Kane reacts after the World Cup semifinal soccer match between England and Argentina in Atlanta, Wednesday, July 15, 2026. (AP Photo/Stephanie Scarbrough) CORRECTION: Corrects byline.

Tuchel's message was to keep attacking, not protect the lead

Argentina's Lionel Messi (10) challenges for the ball with England's Harry Kane (9) during the World Cup semifinal soccer match between England and Argentina in Atlanta, Wednesday, July 15, 2026. (AP Photo/Jeff Roberson)

Kane admits England tried to hold on

Another semi-final, but the same painful ending

reporters

Kane refuses to put a limit on his England future

England captain Harry Kane has revealed the final instruction Thomas Tuchel delivered from the touchline before Argentina turned the FIFA World Cup semi-final on its head, as the Three Lions were left to process another agonising exit on the brink of a major final. Anthony Gordon's second-half strike had put England within touching distance of a place in Sunday's showpiece, but late goals from Enzo Fernández and Lautaro Martínez completed a dramatic 2-1 comeback for the defending champions in Atlanta, extending England's long wait for a first World Cup title since 1966.England appeared to have executed their game plan for much of the contest.After a tense first half in which both sides largely cancelled each other out, Gordon broke the deadlock in the 55th minute, finishing off a flowing move to hand England a priceless advantage against the reigning world champions.Despite taking the lead, Kane revealed that Tuchel's instruction from the technical area was not to retreat and defend but to continue searching for another goal."The boys are always ready for any moment in the game," Kane told BBC Sport."When we went ahead, the message was to go ahead and get another goal."Then obviously once they scored their two goals it was to try and find something. But we couldn't quite get the momentum back in the game."Those words reflected Tuchel's intention to keep England on the front foot rather than invite sustained Argentine pressure. However, as the match wore on, Argentina gradually established control, pinning England deeper inside their own half before finally breaking through in the closing minutes.Looking back at the defeat, Kane felt England's mentality changed after taking the lead, even if that had not been the coaching staff's intention."We're gutted for the boys, gutted for everyone, the team, the staff, the fans," he told reporters."We played a good game for the large majority of it. When we went 1-0 up, we seemed to try and hold on, which at this level is not enough."We've worked so hard to be here. So to fall short is just gutting."Kane refused to blame Tuchel's tactical decisions, instead crediting Argentina for the relentless pressure they generated during the closing stages."We struggled to get pressure on the ball," Kane explained."Especially first half and start of the second half, we pressed them well, we put them under loads of pressure high up the pitch, which then allowed us to win balls and control the game a bit better."After the goal, whether it was them putting more men forward or us not being able to match them man for man, it was just wave after wave."Lads were putting blocks in but, in the end, it just wasn't enough."England eventually succumbed in the 85th minute when Enzo Fernández equalised before Lautaro Martínez headed home the winner deep into stoppage time following another decisive contribution from Lionel Messi The defeat continues a frustrating trend for England's current generation.Since reaching the World Cup semi-finals in 2018, the Three Lions have also finished runners-up at UEFA Euro 2024 and now fallen one match short of another World Cup final.Reflecting on what England must improve, Kane admitted there remains one final hurdle the squad has yet to overcome."We had a lot of good moments in this tournament, a lot of good games, another semi-final," he told"We talk about knocking on the door, we're close, but we just need to find that missing piece in the final stages of the tournament."These tournaments take it out of you, so much effort, pressure and mentality. We've shown a lot of that out of the six or seven weeks we've been together."We're just missing that final piece."Attention also turned to Kane's own international future.The Bayern Munich striker will turn 33 later this month, meaning he would be approaching 37 by the time the next World Cup arrives. Yet he refused to speculate on whether Wednesday's defeat had brought him closer to international retirement."As a person, it's always just about taking it year by year and how I feel," Kane said."The England national team is my pride and joy. It's what I love to do more than anything."Obviously, four years is a long way away. I'll be 33 this summer, but as you see on the other hand with Leo there, he's still performing at the highest level."I never want to put a limit on these things. But for now, it's just about processing another tough loss with this team."For Tuchel, the final instruction from the touchline had been simple: keep attacking and find the second goal that would put the contest beyond Argentina. England instead found themselves overwhelmed by a late surge from the world champions, leaving Kane and his teammates once again to reflect on how another major tournament slipped away just when the final seemed within reach.
Article Summary: England captain harry kane reveals thomas tuchel's final instruction from touchline. England lost 2-1 to argentina in world cup semi-final in atlanta. Enzo fernández and lautaro martínez scored late goals for defending champions. Kane will turn 33 later this month, meaning he would be approaching 37 by the time the next world cup arrives.

Article Title: Is Caitlin Clark alright? Indiana Fever star drops latest health update
Article Text:
Caitlin Clark. Image via: AP

Caitlin Clark's current health update



How the Fever are managing her return



What's next for Clark and the Fever



Caitlin Clark's injury update ahead of Wednesday's game against the Golden State Valkyries confirmed she remains on a minutes restriction as she works back from the back injury she suffered on June 24. The Indiana Fever guard, cleared as probable, told reporters she felt good but acknowledged she is still building toward her normal workload.The Fever sit at 14-9 with four games left before the All-Star break, and how much they can lean on their star guard down the stretch could decide their postseason seeding. As of writing, Clark played the game.Clark missed three games over the past three weeks after the injury occurred against the Mercury. She returned July 8 against the Los Angeles Sparks but logged just 16 minutes, sat out the second half of a back-to-back the next day, then played again July 9 against the Las Vegas Aces, still limited.Speaking before Wednesday's game, Clark kept her answer simple: "I feel good." She added that her focus is on stacking healthy games together and building her conditioning back up gradually, rather than rushing back to a full workload.As of now, she logged 16 minutes to score 6 points.Fever head coach Stephanie White has been direct about the caution, noting it typically takes time for a player to get acclimated after missing extended stretches. Clark has played 24 and 16 minutes in her last two outings, well below her season average of 29.6, itself already a career low for the guard.There is no set timeline for lifting the restriction. White and the coaching staff appear to be using specific conditioning benchmarks, tied to endurance, before restoring Clark's normal minutes.Indiana faces the Seattle Storm and New York Liberty in a back-to-back this Friday and Saturday. Clark said there has been no decision yet on whether she will play both games, though she said she hopes to be available for each.Against the Valkyries specifically, Clark has combined for 38 points, 15 assists, six rebounds, four steals and 11 turnovers across two meetings this season, with the season series currently split 1-1.Whatever the Fever decide about her workload this weekend, one date is already locked in. Clark was named a starter for the WNBA All-Star Game on July 25, an appearance that will happen regardless of how her minutes restriction plays out before then.Clark's day-to-day recovery is clearly the bigger story than any single box score right now, and how Indiana handles the next four games will say a lot about their priorities heading into the postseason.
Article Summary: Caitlin clark remains on a minutes restriction as she works back from a back injury. The indiana fever guard played against the golden state valkyries on wednesday. As of now, she logged 16 minutes to score 6 points. The fever sit at 14-9 with four games left before the all-star break.

Article Title: Argentina risk FIFA punishment after Falkland Islands banner during England win celebrations
Article Text:
Image credit: Agencies

Long-running Falklands dispute



Argentina vice-president reacts



Argentina could face disciplinary action from FIFA after its players celebrated their FIFA World Cup 2026 semi-final win over England by displaying a banner supporting the country's claim over the Falkland Islands.The defending champions staged a dramatic comeback in Atlanta, scoring twice late in the match to beat Thomas Tuchel's England 2-1 and book a place in Sunday's World Cup final against Spain.After the final whistle, Argentina's players celebrated with a banner that read "Las Malvinas son Argentinas", which translates to "The Falklands are Argentine."The Falkland Islands are a British overseas territory in the South Atlantic Ocean. However, Argentina has long claimed sovereignty over the islands.The two countries fought a 74-day war over the islands between April and June 1982. The conflict claimed the lives of 655 Argentine servicemen, 255 British servicemen and three islanders.This is not the first time Argentina has faced action over the issue. In 2014, FIFA fined the Argentine Football Association £20,000 after players displayed a banner carrying the same message before a friendly against Slovenia.At the time, world football's governing body ruled that the act breached its regulations on political action and team misconduct.Following Wednesday's victory, Argentina vice-president Victoria Villarruel celebrated the result on social media."it wasn't just another match", she wrote alongside a video that appeared to show Argentine soldiers.She later added: "The Falklands are Argentine. They banned bringing them to the stadium and forgot that we carry them in our blood and our hearts."Before the semi-final, Villarruel had also described the match as "about putting the invaders in their place".Argentina's players had earlier sung chants referencing the Falklands, along with football legends Diego Maradona and Lionel Messi , after their dramatic 3-2 last-16 win over Egypt.Argentina will now face Spain at MetLife Stadium on Sunday as it looks to become only the third nation to win back-to-back FIFA World Cup titles.
Article Summary: Argentina could face disciplinary action from fifa. Players displayed banner supporting country's claim over falkland islands. Argentina beat england 2-1 in world cup 2026 semi-final in atlanta. Defending champions will now face spain in sunday's final.

Article Title: "His current condition....": Lionel Messi's wife Antonela Roccuzzo breaks silence with heartfelt message amid family health update
Article Text:
Antonela Roccuzzo backed Lionel Messi and Argentina with heartfelt Instagram messages after their World Cup victories, while the Messi family also shared an update confirming Jorge Messi is recovering from health issues. Messi admitted he endured "difficult days" during the tournament, making Argentina's run to the World Cup semifinal even more emotional for the family.

Lionel Messi's wife Antonela Roccuzzo celebrates Argentina's World Cup run

Lionel Messi opens up while Antonela Roccuzzo reflects on family life



Argentina’s journey to another FIFA World Cup final has been a source of excitement for fans and emotional moments for Lionel Messi ’s family. While the captain continues to inspire on the pitch, his wife Antonela Roccuzzo has been cheering from the stands with their three sons Thiago, Mateo and Ciro. The reigning champions are preparing for a high-stakes semifinal with England and Roccuzzo once again showed her support for her husband with a heartfelt social media message that quickly caught the attention of supporters.Roccuzzo has remained one of Messi's biggest supporters throughout the tournament. Following Argentina's quarterfinal victory over Switzerland, she celebrated the team's progress on Instagram with a short but meaningful message.“Let’s go Argentina 🇦🇷. One step closer!!!”The post reflected the growing excitement around Argentina's campaign as the team moved within touching distance of another World Cup final.Earlier in the competition, Argentina produced a dramatic comeback win over Egypt to secure a place in the quarterfinals. After that emotional night, Roccuzzo also shared a personal tribute to her husband, acknowledging yet another memorable performance from the eight-time Ballon d'Or winner.“Go Argentina 🤍. @leomessi There are no words left 🥹🤍.”Her message came during a tournament that has carried special emotional significance for Messi beyond football.Away from the field, the Messi family has also been dealing with a private personal challenge.On June 18, the family released a statement confirming that Lionel Messi's father, Jorge Messi, has been facing health issues while asking for privacy.“He is currently under medical supervision, recovering, and progressing favorably within his current condition,” the family said in a statement to ESPN.The statement also criticized speculation surrounding Jorge Messi's condition.“Given the versions, rumors, and speculation that have circulated in recent hours, the family wishes to express its deep displeasure at the lack of sensitivity, respect, and scruples with which some people have treated a strictly private and family matter.”Although Messi has chosen not to discuss his father's health publicly, he admitted that the beginning of the World Cup was emotionally difficult.“Why did I cry? It was something completely unrelated to football,” Messi noted in a June 17 media session, according to Reuters.“I went through some difficult days. But I’m grateful to the entire delegation and my teammates because they were always by my side, giving me ‌a ⁠lot of strength to help me get through it.”Off the pitch, Roccuzzo has also spoken about adjusting to life in the United States after Messi joined Inter Miami in 2023. Despite living in Florida, she revealed there are still many places she hopes to explore.“I know very little about the United States. I have to travel beyond Orlando!I would love to go to Mexico. I don’t know if there will be an opportunity to go as the World Cup progresses for Argentina. We’ll see, but I would love to go.”She has also reflected on the challenges of leaving Argentina years earlier to begin a new chapter in Spain.“It was hard when I moved to Spain because at that time my family and friends were my nest, where I felt protected, but on the other hand, it helped me grow a lot. It challenged me to move forward, to find solutions, and to step outside my comfort zone.”“You have to keep pushing.It’s hard to leave your roots behind, but I’ve always carried my family and my customs in my heart, in every different place I’ve lived. Even the television we watch at home is Argentinian, wherever we go.”As Argentina continue their World Cup journey, the unwavering support from Roccuzzo and their children remains a powerful reminder that behind every historic performance is a family standing together through both triumphs and personal challenges.
Article Summary: Antonela roccuzzo shared a heartfelt instagram message after argentina's quarterfinal victory over switzerland. She has remained one of lionel messi's biggest supporters throughout the tournament. The messi family also shared an update confirming jorge messi is recovering from health issues.

Article Title: NBA trade rumor: Philadelphia 76ers proposed to send $187 million star to Atlanta Hawks for a blockbuster deal
Article Text:
The Philadelphia 76ers are linked to a blockbuster trade proposal involving their $187 million star. Image via: 76ers | Hawks

Category Details Player Joel Embiid Current Team Philadelphia 76ers Rumored Teams Atlanta Hawks, Dallas Mavericks, Golden State Warriors Contract Status Three-year, $187 million extension begins in 2026–27 Salary Cap Hit $52.9 million (2026–27), $62.6 million (2027–28), $67.2 million player option (2028–29) Trade Likelihood Speculative, no formal offer confirmed Latest Insider Update Front-office conversations reportedly ongoing, per local radio Potential Return (Hawks proposal) Dyson Daniels, Zaccharie Risacher, Corey Kispert

Which teams are interested in Joel Embiid?

Joel Embiid. Image via: Bill Streicher-Imagn Images

Atlanta Hawks: Would receive Embiid and a 2029 Clippers first-round pick; Philadelphia would get Daniels, Risacher, and Kispert

Dallas Mavericks: Discussed as a three-team framework involving Milwaukee, with Embiid landing in Dallas and Daniel Gafford, PJ Washington, and Klay Thompson routed to Philadelphia

Golden State Warriors: Floated as a fallback option if the Warriors miss out on LeBron James in free agency

What are insiders saying about the trade rumor?

Contract details and salary cap implications

How the trade could impact both teams

Joel Embiid averaged 26.9 points a game last season when healthy enough to play, which was only 38 times. That single stat sums up why Philadelphia's front office is reportedly shopping the 2023 MVP even as a new three-year max extension looms. A proposed deal from FanSided's Eamon Cassels would send Embiid to the Atlanta Hawks, but insiders say Dallas and Golden State have also entered the picture as the Sixers weigh how to escape one of the league's most expensive and unpredictable contracts.The math is the problem. Embiid, Jaylen Brown, Tyrese Maxey, and VJ Edgecomb together represent a financial commitment the front office reportedly views as unsustainable, and Embiid's next contract phase pushes that tension to a breaking point.Three franchises have emerged in trade chatter, each with a different motive. As per the ongoing rumors The Atlanta Hawks have emerged as the most concrete suitor in Joel Embiid trade talks, with FanSided proposing a deal that sends Embiid and a 2029 Los Angeles Clippers first-round pick to Atlanta in exchange for Dyson Daniels, Zaccharie Risacher, and Corey Kispert. The Hawks finished sixth in the East last season and are still searching for a true superstar after trading Trae Young, making a healthy Embiid an appealing gamble despite his injury history.Dallas and Golden State have also surfaced in broader speculation, but the Hawks proposal remains the only trade package with specific names attached.Atlanta's angle centers on upgrading star power after moving on from Trae Young, while Dallas GM Masai Ujiri's history with Embiid makes that pairing a recurring rumor. The scenario is certainly wild, if both teams give their nod, Embidd will be in a different jersey in a major roster revamp.97.5 The Fanatic co-host Sean Brace said front-office conversations about moving Embiid are "absolutely happening." The Ringer's Bill Simmons pointed to Ujiri's long relationship with Embiid as the reason Dallas keeps surfacing, while NBA insider Chris Haynes added that Ujiri "won't make a change just to make a change," but wouldn't rule out a move this summer.Embiid's new deal runs three years at $187 million, structured at $52.9 million, $62.6 million, and a $67.2 million player option in the final year. That structure makes him one of the most expensive players in the league relative to games played, since he appeared in just 38 contests last season.For Philadelphia, moving Embiid would shed long-term risk but likely return only role players unless a third team adds draft capital. For any acquiring team, the upside is real: a healthy Embiid remains one of basketball's most dominant scorers. The downside, injury history and one of the league's largest active contracts, is exactly why no deal has materialized yet. Philadelphia's front office faces a decision point before training camp opens, and how they value risk against Embiid's ceiling will determine whether any of these rumors become reality.
Article Summary: Philadelphia 76ers forward joel embiid has a three-year, $187 million contract. The 2023 mvp is one of the most expensive players in the league relative to games played. The atlanta hawks have emerged as the most concrete suitor in trade talks. Dallas and golden state have also entered the picture.

Article Title: FIFA WC 2026: Lionel Messi to join Cafu as only players to take the field in three World Cup finals
Article Text:
Argentina's Lionel Messi celebrates with his teammates at the end of the World Cup semifinal match between England and Argentina.(AP Photo)

When Lionel Messi takes to the field at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey for Argentina's World Cup final against Spain, he will become only the second player in history to actually play in three World Cup finals, joining Brazil's legendary right back Cafu in an exclusive club that has stood untouched for over two decades.The distinction matters. Pelé, Matthäus and Ronaldo have all appeared in three World Cup final squads but each of them was an unused substitute in one of those three finals. Pelé was on the bench for Brazil's 1966 defeat to England. Matthäus was an unused substitute in Germany's 1986 final loss to Argentina. Ronaldo famously did not start the 1998 final against France, appearing only as a starter after a late and controversial reinstatement to the lineup following a reported seizure, though he was largely ineffective. None of them took the field in all three as active, participating players.Cafu did. The Brazilian right back played every minute of the 1994, 1998 and 2002 World Cup finals, lifting the trophy in 1994 and 2002, and finishing as a runner-up in 1998. He remains the gold standard of World Cup final appearances.Messi's three finals tell their own remarkable story. In 2014, he played every minute of Argentina's heartbreaking extra-time defeat to Germany in Brazil, winning the Golden Ball as the tournament's best player despite losing the final.In 2022, he delivered one of the greatest individual performances in final history, scoring twice, including a stunning volley, before converting the decisive penalty in the shootout against France.Now comes 2026. A third final. Against Spain. At 39 years old.Cafu was 32 when he played his third final in 2002 and lifted the trophy. Messi is 39 and chasing the same ending. Should Argentina win on Sunday, Messi will not just have matched Cafu's record of playing in three finals. He will have surpassed it in the most meaningful way possible with two World Cup winners' medals instead of one.
Article Summary: Lionel messi will become only the second player in history to play in three world cup finals. He will join brazil's legendary right back cafu in an exclusive club. Pelé, matthäus and ronaldo have all appeared in three final squads but each of them was an unused substitute.

Article Title: George Kittle reveals what gives him strength as San Francisco 49ers await his return from Achilles injury
Article Text:
George Kittle reveals what keeps him going during his Achilles recovery (Image via: IG/X)

George Kittle says his passion for football and family continues to push him forward every day

The 49ers believe George Kittle's return could be the boost their offense needs

George Kittle has already achieved more than most NFL players dream of, but the San Francisco 49ers star believes he still has plenty left to accomplish. As he prepares for his 10th season with the franchise, Kittle remains focused on getting back on the field after suffering a season ending Achilles injury during the 2025 playoffs.The veteran tight end has stayed positive throughout his recovery, while the 49ers continue to hope he will be ready for the start of the new season. At the same time, Kittle recently shared what continues to motivate him after nearly a decade in the league, offering fans a glimpse into the mindset that has helped make him one of the NFL's best tight ends.Reaching a 10th season with one NFL team is an achievement very few players experience. Kittle is now one of the longest serving members of the 49ers roster and has built a career that includes 595 receptions, 8,008 receiving yards and 52 touchdowns in 124 regular season games.Speaking about what has kept him motivated over the years, Kittle made it clear that his love for football, support from his family and appreciation for every opportunity continue to fuel him despite the challenges of recovering from a major injury."You know, it's just I love football and I'm very aware that you have so many years to play this awesome game," he said."And so, I'm going to do everything I can to play as long as I possibly can. It's not really hard for me to be motivated every single day."Like, I wake up, you know, my wife loves me, my family's healthy and I get paid to play football. So, what I'm going to do is try my best to take advantage of my opportunity to play football."Whether that's training a lot, being on the field as much as I can be, recovering as best as I can, that's really easy for me. And then, I like to surround myself with like-minded people. So, you know, I train with a bunch of other NFL guys in the offseason at my place in Tennessee."And it's just like you're always, you know, it's good for the team morale, but you're also comparing yourself and competing with the guys you're working out with."So, like, you're always seeing me compare with other guys across the league. I love the game and I also believe there's football gods, so you get out what you put into it, and you know, it's done pretty well by me."While Kittle continues working his way back, his recovery remains one of the biggest storylines for San Francisco heading into training camp. He tore his right Achilles during the team's Wild Card victory over the Philadelphia Eagles in January, forcing the 49ers to finish their playoff run without one of their most reliable offensive weapons.Kittle has previously said he expects to return well before November, while general manager John Lynch and head coach Kyle Shanahan have both expressed optimism that he could even be available for Week 1. The season opener against the Los Angeles Rams in Melbourne, Australia would also be the NFL's first regular season game on the continent, making his progress even more closely watched.
Article Summary: San francisco 49ers tight end george kittle says his passion for football and family continues to push him forward every day. Kittle suffered a season-ending achilles injury during the team's wild card victory over the philadelphia eagles in january.

Article Title: What is Thomas Tuchel's net worth in 2026? England boss' contract, career earnings, personal life and more
Article Text:
Thomas Tuchel. Image via: Richard Pelham/ Getty Images

What is Thomas Tuchel's net worth in 2026?



Category



Details



Estimated Net Worth (2026)



£37 million to $50 million (estimates vary by source)



Career Field



Professional football management



Main Income Sources



Club and international manager salaries, trophy bonuses, contract payouts



Major Employers



Mainz, Borussia Dortmund, Paris Saint-Germain (PSG), Chelsea, Bayern Munich, England





Thomas Tuchel's contract and career earnings



Thomas Tuchel. Image via: Getty Images

Thomas Tuchel's personal life



Thomas Tuchel's net worth has drawn fresh attention as the England manager leads the Three Lions through their 2026 World Cup buildup, with estimates placing his wealth anywhere between £37 million and $50 million depending on the source. Tuchel, 51, took charge of England in January 2025 after high-profile spells at some of Europe's biggest clubs, and his finances have grown steadily alongside a coaching career that includes a Champions League title with Chelsea and league silverware in Germany and France.Different outlets place Tuchel's fortune at different levels. Finance Monthly estimated his net worth at roughly £37 million (per Mirror), while other reports have put the figure closer to $50 million. The gap likely reflects differing methods of valuing performance bonuses, image rights and investment income, none of which Tuchel discusses publicly.Tuchel signed with England on a reported annual salary of £5 million, about $6.5 million, a deal that runs through the 2026 World Cup cycle. That figure actually represents a pay cut of roughly a third compared to the £7.5 million he earned annually at Bayern Munich, suggesting the England job carried more appeal than money for him at this stage of his career.His overall coaching earnings, estimated between $70 million and $80 million before tax, were built across nearly two decades. Paris Saint-Germain paid him around £6 million a year during his two and a half seasons there, while Chelsea reportedly paid roughly £13 million to remove him from his contract in September 2022, just over a year after he delivered the club's 2021 Champions League title. Should England enjoy tournament success this year, a contract extension with improved terms remains a realistic possibility.Tuchel's coaching success has come alongside a turbulent personal chapter. His 13-year marriage to Sissi, a journalist he met while she worked for the German newspaper Süddeutsche Zeitung, ended in divorce proceedings that became public in April 2022. The couple wed in 2009 and share two daughters. Tuchel has since spoken about the strain his career placed on family life, saying of one stretch away from home, "It was a long summer, but it did not feel so long. "By 2022, the demands of managing clubs across three countries had taken their toll. A source close to the family indicated the couple had tried to keep the marriage together but ultimately concluded there was no path forward, with the priority shifting to their daughters as divorce papers were filed. Tuchel has kept his life since largely private, and reports have linked him to a new relationship without confirmed details from him directly.Tuchel has largely stayed out of the endorsement circuit throughout his career, preferring to let his coaching record speak for itself rather than build a commercial brand. That same restraint extends to his lifestyle. He previously owned a home in Cobham, Surrey during his Chelsea tenure but has not disclosed current property details, and reports linking him to Audi and Mercedes-Benz models remain unconfirmed. Whether England's World Cup campaign adds another chapter to his earnings, or another line to his coaching legacy, may depend on how the Three Lions perform when the tournament arrives.
Article Summary: England manager thomas tuchel's net worth estimated between £37 million and $50 million. Tuchel, 51, took charge of england in january 2025 after high-profile spells at some of europe's biggest clubs. His overall coaching earnings were built across nearly two decades.

Article Title: 'Nothing personal': Jude Bellingham reveals truth behind fiery Lionel Messi clash after England heartbreak
Article Text:
Lionel Messi and Jude Bellingham were seen in a heated exchange during Argentina's World Cup semi-final win, with the England star later explaining the moment/ Image: X

Record-breaking first half set the tone

England's Jude Bellingham, left, and Argentina's Lionel Messi collide during the World Cup semifinal soccer match between England and Argentina in Atlanta, Wednesday, July 15, 2026. (AP Photo/George Walker IV)

Argentina's Enzo Fernandez pushes England's Jude Bellingham, left, away from teammate Lionel Messi, on the ground, during the World Cup semifinal soccer match between England and Argentina in Atlanta, Wednesday, July 15, 2026. (AP Photo/Rebecca Blackwell)

Bellingham explains exchange with Messi

Respect despite the disappointment

Argentina's dramatic 2-1 victory over England in the 2026 FIFA World Cup semi-final was defined not only by Lionel Messi 's late brilliance but also by one of the tournament's most fiercely contested opening halves, with Jude Bellingham later revealing that his viral confrontation with the Argentina captain was simply the product of an increasingly physical contest rather than any personal animosity.The defending world champions overturned Anthony Gordon's second-half opener through late goals from Enzo Fernández and Lautaro Martínez to book a place in the World Cup final against Spain. Yet before the late drama unfolded, the match had already become one of the most combative contests in World Cup history.From the opening whistle in Atlanta, both teams competed with relentless intensity.Argentina and England combined for 26 fouls across the 90 minutes, with Lionel Scaloni's side committing 15 fouls and collecting three yellow cards, while England conceded 11 fouls and received one booking.The opening 45 minutes alone produced a remarkable 19 fouls, setting a new record for the most fouls committed in the first half of a FIFA World Cup match.The stop-start nature of the contest led to repeated confrontations between players as frustration mounted on both sides.England's anger increased further when referee Szymon Marciniak blew for half-time moments after the allotted three minutes of stoppage time had elapsed, denying the Three Lions the opportunity to take a corner they had just been awarded.Shortly beforehand, Bellingham had also appealed unsuccessfully for a foul, adding to England's frustration with the officiating.Amid the heated atmosphere, television cameras captured an animated exchange between Bellingham and Messi, with the Argentina captain staring back before appearing to nod dismissively. The footage quickly spread across social media, prompting speculation about what had been said.Speaking afterwards, however, Bellingham played down the tense scenes, insisting that what appeared to be a heated confrontation was simply a disagreement over an earlier challenge."We were discussing a foul, actually," Bellingham said, as quoted by USA Today. "But it was nothing bad. I'm sure everyone will do their thing and make it a big deal. But no, it was nothing really."The England midfielder explained that both players were simply defending their respective positions during the conversation."I thought there was a foul earlier and he said, 'Well what about the one on me?' and I was kind of saying, 'You're strong enough to take it,' you know what I mean?"Despite England's heartbreaking exit after conceding twice in the closing minutes, Bellingham made clear there was nothing personal between himself and the Argentina captain."It's a privilege to play against him," Bellingham said."There was nothing against him. I'm obviously on the losing side which hurts a lot, but it's a privilege to go against him."Ultimately, the confrontation proved to be just one moment in a semi-final remembered for its relentless physicality, record-breaking foul count and another decisive display from Messi, whose two assists completed Argentina's comeback and sent the reigning champions into a second consecutive World Cup final.
Article Summary: Argentina beat england 2-1 in the 2026 world cup semi-final in atlanta. Late goals from enzo fernández and lautaro martínez secured argentina's place in the final. England's jude bellingham was seen in a heated exchange with lionel messi. Bellingham later explained that the confrontation was over an earlier challenge.

Article Title: "SAVE ME": IShowSpeed begs Lamine Yamal to beat Argentina so he does not have to watch Messi win the FIFA World Cup again
Article Text:
IShowSpeed's emotional message to Lamine Yamal goes viral before FIFA World Cup final (Getty Images)

Why is IShowSpeed asking Lamine Yamal to save Ronaldo fans before the World Cup Final?

IShowSpeed has one request ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup Final on Sunday, and it has nothing to do with tactics. The American streamer, one of Cristiano Ronaldo 's most vocal online supporters, is placing all his faith in 19-year-old Spanish winger Lamine Yamal to stop Lionel Messi and Argentina from winning back-to-back World Cup titles. He made it clear in the closing minutes of his Wednesday YouTube stream, and the plea was anything but calm.Speed's message to Laimne Yamal was direct. "You got a lot of weight on your shoulders. Lamine Yamal, this message is for you," he said on stream. "LOCK IN! PLEASE! Por favor, Lamine." He wasn't just cheering for Spain. He was asking Yamal to carry the emotional burden of an entire fanbase."Save me from disaster," Speed said. "If Messi wins the World Cup again, I don't know what I can say as a Ronaldo fan. I can't say anything. I can't say nothing. So, Lamine Yamal, save us Ronaldo fans."The reason isn't complicated. Speed has been one of Ronaldo's loudest cheerleaders on the internet for years. He has travelled to watch CR7 play in person, broken down crying on stream at Ronaldo goals, and built a significant part of his online identity around his admiration for the Portuguese forward. That's not casual fandom. For Speed, Ronaldo is personal.So when Portugal went home early from this World Cup and Messi kept marching forward with Argentina, the stakes got very real, very fast.His anxiety can be understood very well. If Argentina lifts the trophy on Sunday, Messi will have two World Cups to Ronaldo's zero. Portugal crashed out earlier in the tournament, and Ronaldo responded by arguing that winning the 2016 UEFA Euros was "on the same level" as a World Cup. That claim didn't go down well with most football fans, and Speed knows it.What makes his desperation funnier is his track record throughout this tournament. Speed backed Cape Verde, Egypt, and England each time they faced Argentina in the knockout rounds. None of it worked. He even tried a reverse curse before Argentina's match against Switzerland, wearing a full Argentina kit on stream hoping it would jinx them. Argentina won anyway.Argentina has looked like a team that refuses to lose. Their comebacks against Egypt and England had that eerie sense of inevitability about them. But Spain have been a different kind of team entirely. Measured, compact, clinical. They conceded just one goal across the entire tournament and eliminated France, one of the pre-tournament favourites, without breaking much of a sweat. Yamal has been central to all of it. At 19, he is already operating at a level that makes Sunday's final feel like his stage as much as anyone else's.Speed knows this. And that's exactly why he is pinning everything on the teenager.
Article Summary: Ishowspeed is one of cristiano ronaldo's most vocal online supporters. He is placing all his faith in 19-year-old lamine yamal to stop lionel messi and argentina from winning back-to-back world cup titles. Speed has been one of ronaldo's loudest cheerleaders on the internet for years.

Article Title: "Is it the money?" : Harry Kane admits he'd be suspicious of meeting women now ahead of England's Argentina clash
Article Text:
"Is it the money?": Harry Kane admits he'd be suspicious of meeting women now ahead of England's Argentina clash(Image via Getty Images)

Harry Kane opens up about how he is lucky to have found his wife, Katie Kane, when they were teenagers

Harry Kane breaks silence on how playing in the 2026 World Cup semi finals was a part of his childhood dreams as he gears up to clash against Argentina

The Bayern Munich striker and the captain of the English team Harry Kane has been a force to be reckoned with on the field as he netted 6 goals across 6 matches in the tournament so far. While all eyes remain on Harry Kane as he gears up to face Argentina today, he has never shied away from speaking about the life he shares with his wife, Katie Kane.In an interview with the English Standard, the captain of the English team Harry Kane opened up about being with his wife, Katie Kane in his childhood as he said, “If I was single now and meeting people, you’d never know if they were with you for the right reasons…”Harry Kane added, “Is it the money? You’d never really know. So I’m lucky that I’ve got a childhood sweetheart.”In another recent interview, the captain of the English team reflected on his family as he said, “I have a great family, they keep me grounded, and they’ve worked just as hard as me to get me where I am…”Harry Kane added, “I want to be with Kate and the family,” he said. “I am not a drinker; I am not someone who wants to be seen out and about. I want to be a top footballer, and that means focus, and it means doing everything you need to do to be the best you can be.”At this point in time, all eyes remain on Harry Kane as he and the English team gear up to face Argentina in a thrilling match today.A few hours ago, Harry Kane spoke to ITV about facing Argentina as he said, "I mean, what a game, what an occasion to play one of the best teams, the reigning world champions, in a semifinal of a World Cup…In these moments, I think back to being a kid and having dreams and what it'd be like to play in these games.”Harry Kane added, "This is as big as it gets, so I'm really excited for this week. I think it's going to be a special game and what a tough team to play against but hopefully that brings the best out in us.”Billions of fans across the world will be tuning in to watch the thrilling match between England and Argentina today as the nations brace themselves for the semi finals in the 2026 World Cup.
Article Summary: "is it the money? ": harry kane admits he'd be suspicious of meeting women now ahead of england's argentina clash. Harry kane opens up about how he is lucky to have found his wife, katie kane, when they were teenagers.

Article Title: Antonela Roccuzzo stuns in ab-flexing Argentina fit as Lionel Messi leads the team to the FIFA World Cup Final
Article Text:
Lionel Messi's wife Antonela Roccuzzo (Instagram)

What did Antonela Roccuzzo post after Argentina beat England in the World Cup semifinal?

Argentina barely survived Wednesday night at Atlanta's Mercedes-Benz Stadium. Enzo Fernandez pulled the reigning champions level in the 85th minute before Lautaro Martinez headed home in the 92nd to complete a 2-1 comeback over England, and in the stands, the cameras found Antonela Roccuzzo the moment the equalizer hit the back of the net - mascara running, arms wrapped around the person next to her, every bit of tension she'd been holding for 85 minutes finally letting go. Both goals were set up by Lionel Messi , who now leads the Golden Boot standings on assists, though he barely touched the ball in the moment that mattered most - the pass did the work. Within minutes of the final whistle, Roccuzzo was on Instagram.Antonela Roccuzzo posted a family photo with sons Thiago, Mateo, and Ciro and captioned it: "Gracias Dios!!! Vamooos Argentina!!!! A la Final!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!" — Thank you, God. Let's go Argentina. To the Final. Simple, loud, and completely unfiltered. The post crossed a million likes in under an hour.ID@undefinedCaption not available.ID@undefinedCaption not available.In the broadcast footage, Roccuzzo went from visible suffering to tears in seconds after Fernandez's strike went in, immediately pulling someone into a tight embrace. It went viral fast. She's been present for all of it this tournament — the Egypt comeback, the Switzerland win, and now the most emotionally loaded fixture Argentina had faced in years.She was singing "el que no salta, es un inglés" alongside Argentina fans before the goals even came.For the semifinal she wore the home sky blue and white Argentina jersey alongside white joggers, matching all three boys, who had the No. 10 Messi on their backs. It was a departure from the alternate jersey she'd worn at earlier matches this tournament, but the result stayed the same.ID@undefinedCaption not available.ID@undefinedCaption not available.After Argentina's win over Egypt in the quarterfinals, she'd posted a tribute admitting she had run out of words: "Te amo. @leomessi no more words left," she wrote in Spanish. Against England, she found three more words and about 30 exclamation marks.Argentina now advance to face Spain on Sunday, attempting to become the first back-to-back World Cup champions since Brazil in 1958 and 1962. They enter that final as underdogs, with Spain installed as favorites. Messi turns 40 in June next year. This is almost certainly the last time he'll stand on a World Cup final pitch.Roccuzzo has watched every chapter of this career. The Qatar final, the Paris years, the move to Miami, and now this. Whatever she wears Sunday at MetLife Stadium, you already know what the post will look like if Argentina win.
Article Summary: Argentina beat england 2-1 in world cup semifinal in atlanta. Enzo fernandez and lautaro martinez scored the goals. Lionel messi set up both goals for argentina. Messi's wife antonela roccuzzo was in the stands.
